zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Elliott於1580年9月15日出生在英國艾可布萊崔時，她的父親Edward Elliot45歲，母親Jane Gedge34歲。她於1599年12月27日與Stephen Butler在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1662年10月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德奧福德 帕里什享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Elliott于1580年9月15日出生在英国艾可布萊崔时，她的父亲Edward Elliot45岁，母亲Jane Gedge34岁。她于1599年12月27日与Stephen Butler在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1662年10月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德奧福德 帕里什享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elliott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Eliot, a pet form of the Old Testament name Elijah, rendered in Greek as Ēlias and in Old French as Élie + the diminutive suffix -ot; compare Ellis . The name Aylett may in some cases also have been confused with or absorbed into Elliott.

Scottish (of Breton origin): perhaps, as some members of the Elliott clan believe, a Scottish variant of the Breton surname Elleouet, a habitational name from one of the hamlets named Allegot in Finistère.

variants.name: Ellis
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Elis, an Old French vernacular form of Elias, the Latin and New Testament Greek form of Hebrew Eliyahu; see Elijah and compare Elias , Lias , Ely .
English: possibly in some instances from the Middle English female personal name Elice, a pet form of Elizabeth .

Welsh: from Elis, a shortened form of the Welsh personal name Elisse (earlier Elisedd, a derivative of elus ‘kindly, benevolent’). As usual in Welsh, the stress in Elisse is on the penultimate syllable -li-, which shifts to initial El- when the name is shortened to Elis. It later became confused with Ellis in 1 above.

variants.name: Aylett
meanings: English (Essex and London): from the Middle English personal names Aillet, Aliett, or Eliet, the main source of which is the common Old English female name Æthelgȳth, composed of the elements æthel ‘noble’ + gȳth ‘war’, but the much rarer Old English male name Æthelgēat, containing the tribal name Gēat, may also have contributed. See also Elliott and Ellett , with which this name may have been confused.

variants.name: Eliot
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Elliott  .

History: Andrew Eliot, a shoemaker of East Coker, Somerset, England, who emigrated to Boston, MA, in 1670, was the founder of a distinguished American family which included the poet T. S. Eliot (1888–1965), who was born in St. Louis, MO. The earliest Eliot recorded in North America was John Eliot (1604–90), a Puritan missionary known as the ‘Indian Apostle’, who was born in Hertfordshire and sailed to Boston in 1631. He later settled in Roxbury, MA.

variants.name: Elliot
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Elliott  .

variants.name: Elwood
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Elwald, Elwold, Alwold (Old English Ælfweald, ælf ‘elf’ + weald ‘rule’). The surname is now rare in Scotland, but was once quite common in the Scottish borders where it was altered to Elliott and Ellett . The different surnames may have co-existed and become confused with one other.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Elliott was born on 15 September 1580, in Braintree, Essex, England, her father, Edward Elliot, was 45 and her mother, Jane Gedge, was 34. She married Stephen Butler on 27 December 1599, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 15 October 1662, in Orford Parish, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 82.

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Elliott(이)가 1580년 9월 15일 영국 에세스 브레이트리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Elliot(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Gedge(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1599년 12월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Stephen Butler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1662년 10월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 르퍼드 파리시에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.15 September 1580–15 October 1662: 15 de setembro de 1580–15 de outubro de 1662
pt.Orford Parish, Hartford, Connecticut Col: Orford Parish, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Elliott nasceu em 15 de setembro de 1580, em Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Elliot, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Jane Gedge, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Stephen Butler em 27 de dezembro de 1599, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1662, em Orford Parish, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Elliott родилась 15 сентября 1580 г. в местности бреинтри, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Elliot было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Gedge, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen Butler 27 декабря 1599 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 15 октября 1662 г. в местности орфорд пэриш, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Elliott nació el 15 de septiembre de 1580, en Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward Elliot, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Jane Gedge, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Stephen Butler el 27 de diciembre de 1599, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1662, en Orford Parish, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 82 años.
